tasks.label: Kill Port 8081 Process
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output ('Killed PID ' + $conn.OwningProcess) } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 8081' }"
